Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Jack Lewis papers
Lewis, W. Jack.
6508
51 cubic feet. 51 cubic feet.
1915-2001. Printed material, correspondence, publications. Personal and professional papers of Jack Lewis relating to his career as a chaplain and minister; the Christian Faith and Life Community; Cornell United Religious Work (CURW) and many community based social support programs. Collection material in English 4413485
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Fredrika Loew
Date completed:
January 2018
EAD encoding:
Fredrika Loew, May 2018
Date modified:
Fredrika Loew, March 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Personal and professional papers of Jack Lewis relating to his career as a chaplain and minister; the Christian Faith and Life Community; Cornell United Religious Work (CURW) and many community based social support programs.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Christian Faith and Life Community (CFLC) files
General Files Administrative Files Institute of Cultural Affairs (ICA) Speaking Engagements and Conferences Class, Program, and Workshop Papers General Correspondence Publications, Newsletters, and Bulletins
Series II. Cornell United Religious Works (CURW)
General Files Administrative and Historical Files Correspondence Sage Chapel documents Social Programs Speaking Engagements, Workshops, and Conference Files Resource Files
Series III. Work and Study Resource Files
Series IV. Social Programs
Alcoholism Hospital Chaplaincy and Cornell Visitation Pastoral Counseling Cornell Retiree Program Other Programs
Series V. Workshops, Lectures, and Sermons
General Sage Chapel
Series VI. US Navy Documents
Alphabetical Correspondence Files General Material Funeral Services
Series VII. Series VII. Weddings (Restricted)
Series VIII. Series VIII. Funerals
Series IX. Personal Documents
Correspondence General Materials School Years Travel
Series X. Publications
Series XI. Series Audio/Visual Material
Cite As:
Jack Lewis Collection, #6508. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Birth certificates restricted for 75 years and the person whose name is on the birth certificate is known to be deceased. Death certificates restricted for 50 years. Marriage certificates restricted for 50 years and both spouses are known to be deceased. Clergy Consultation Service correspondence and notes that include personally identifying patient or doctor information restricted to the permission of the curator. Personal correspondence or other material written in confidence to or from Lewis in his role as a member of the clergy is restricted to the permission of the curator.
Use Restrictions
Some material in this collection was in proximity to discarded material that contained mold, animal feces, and urine contamination.
